gene_region.label: HNF1A transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical HNF1A genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: HNF1A encodes hepatocyte nuclear factor 1-alpha, a homeobox transcription factor. This bundle emphasizes pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local HNF1A bundle is diabetes transcription-factor review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: HNF1A variants can alter or tag pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
condition_research_overview: Beta-cell function and glycemic trait biology
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: HNF1A methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for HNF1A.
Because HNF1A biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use HNF1A promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations.
Beta-cell function and glycemic trait biology

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000135100: HNF1A coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: HNF1A biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: HNF1A: pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a HNF1A diabetes transcription-factor review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations and MODY3 review context, Beta-cell function and glycemic trait biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: HNF1A MODY3 loss-of-function model is curated as a HNF1A marker for MODY3 review context, Beta-cell function and glycemic trait biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: Beta-cell function and glycemic trait biology
research_context: Use this marker as a HNF1A pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair HNF1A MODY3 loss-of-function model with HNF1A methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
